metadata.description: The Stratafy Team — a full fractional leadership team, powered by AI. Every role grounded in your live strategy.

plugins.name: stratafy-core
plugins.description: Universal Stratafy connector — link a project to any workspace (/stratafy:link), pull its foundation + key context and keep it in sync (/stratafy:sync), with link + telemetry transparency (/stratafy:status). Auto-grounds every session: a managed CLAUDE.local.md block @-imports the cache AND carries a workspace-pin working rule so any Stratafy MCP operation in the folder targets the bound workspace — read and write both covered, zero ceremony. Workspace-agnostic (binding is data in .stratafy/link.json, no hardcoded ID); project-scoped; gitignored; never touches the user's CLAUDE.md.

plugins.name: stratafy-team
plugins.description: Your AI execution partner — connects daily work to company strategy. Daily rhythm, strategic context, role-adapted coaching, and Personal Intelligence onboarding for every team member.

plugins.name: stratafy-guardian
plugins.description: Guardian of your strategy. Watches over structural health, content quality, execution alignment, and strategic coherence — surfacing what needs attention before it becomes a problem.

plugins.name: stratafy-expert-cfo
plugins.description: Your fractional Finance Director — connects every dollar to strategic intent. Chart of accounts design, financial alignment, budget mapping, pricing models, metrics analysis, and investor prep.

plugins.name: stratafy-expert-cto
plugins.description: Your fractional CTO — connects technology decisions to strategic intent. Architecture reviews, build-vs-buy analysis, tech debt assessment, risk scanning, and strategy tree reprioritisation. Architecture briefs now persist as first-class versioned workspace entities.

plugins.name: stratafy-expert-chro
plugins.description: Your fractional CHRO — connects people decisions to strategic intent. Org design, team health, hiring strategy, retention scanning, culture alignment, onboarding plans, and distributed-work health scans that serve the mission. Hiring briefs persist as first-class versioned workspace entities.

plugins.name: stratafy-genesis
plugins.description: Compose a complete Stratafy workspace from a seed idea — synchronous parallel multi-expert standup (CMO/CTO/FD/GC/CHRO) via tool-restricted sub-agents, reconciliation into L0 root + L1 thrusts hierarchy, write-through, and Expert Agent Runtime activation in under 15 minutes. Bootstraps a workspace AND turns on autonomous expert scans. Sub-agents stay off the Stratafy MCP tool surface, keeping input-token footprint tight. v0.4.4 adds mandatory workspace-selection gate, strategy_type enum discipline, HTML-entity decoding, and alignment-suite feedback loop.
